title: MDHHS-Bioinformatics/basset pipeline - params.input schema
description: Schema for the file provided with params.input

sample.errorMessage: Sample name must be provided and cannot contain spaces

fastq_1.errorMessage: FastQ file for reads 1 must have extension '.fq.gz' or '.fastq.gz' and cannot contain spaces

fastq_2.errorMessage: FastQ file for reads 2 must have extension '.fq.gz' or '.fastq.gz' and cannot contain spaces

annotation.errorMessage: Annotation file must have extension '.gff', '.gff3', '.gb', '.gbk', '.gbff' and cannot contain spaces

assembly.errorMessage: Assembly FASTA file must be 'NA', empty, or have extension '.fasta', '.fna', or '.fa', optionally compressed as '.gz', and cannot contain spaces

cluster_id.errorMessage: Cluster ID cannot contain spaces or special characters

species.errorMessage: Species ID cannot contain special characters

reference.errorMessage: Reference FASTA file must have extension '.fasta', '.fna', or '.fa', optionally compressed as '.gz', and cannot contain spaces
